description: Stage3 real SQLite experiment on the same semantic workflow: load, build index, reopen, random point lookups.

dataset.notes: Persons(id,name,age) generated in reverse id order.

workload.notes: After index build and reopen execute random point lookups by id.

faultProfile.notes: No fault injection in stage3 first cross-engine comparison.

fairnessProfile.notes: SQLite mapping for stage3 baseline: journal_mode=WAL, synchronous=FULL, temp_store=FILE.
